content.en:
After Ye Tian entered the Seventh Realm River, he immediately went to meet an Eternal Controller, the Yan Yan Controller.

This is a registered disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, who is also quite famous in the Seventh Realm River, and is also a Seventh Domain level controller.

He knew where the master lived, so he came directly.

Yanyan Holy Mountain.

Ye Tian came here and went directly to the top of Yanyan Holy Mountain.

The subordinates of the Yan Yan controller tried to stop Ye Tian, but they were reprimanded and retreated by the Yan Yan controller.

At this time.

The moment Yan Yan's controller saw Ye Tian, he recognized it.

"I've seen Senior Brother!"

Yan Yan's controller said respectfully.

"Senior Brother Yan is polite, I came here this time to ask you for help. Ye Tian said.

"Senior brother, please say, if you can help, I will definitely help. "

Yan Yan's controller hurriedly assured.

He knew who this person was in front of him, the sixth personal disciple recently accepted by the Ten Elements Ancestor, who had unlimited potential in the future, and even had the hope of becoming a Ten Realm-level master.

As long as it does not fall, it will inevitably reach the peak of the Origin Realm Sea in the future.

If you can do a favor when this senior brother is still weak, it will be a relationship, and if you ask him for help in the future, it will naturally be easier to talk.

Therefore, he was happy to help Ye Tian.

Ye Tian said directly: "I want to find the Devouring Mountain, but I am not familiar with the Seventh Realm River, and there are no other familiar controllers here, so I can only come to get rid of my junior brother." "

"Devouring Mountain! Senior Brother wants to find it. Although the Yan Yan Controller was curious about why Ye Tian was looking for the Devouring Mountain, he didn't ask too much.

"Senior brother, the Devouring Mountain has appeared once in a long time, but no one dares to provoke it, so it will disappear soon after, I can mobilize my people to look for it, but how long it will take to find it, then I dare not guarantee. Yan Yan said.

"Then please junior brother, I will be in the Seventh Realm River for this period of time, if there is any news from junior brother, please let me know. Ye Tian said.

Yan Yan's controller naturally agreed, and then the two exchanged contact information.

After that, Ye Tian left here.

......

Naturally, the Yan Yan Controller would not agree to do nothing, and he immediately summoned the Half-Step Eternal Masters under his command, as well as many Peak Legendary Realm Lords.

Suddenly, a large number of strong people gathered in Yanyan Holy Mountain.

"Meet the Mountain Lord!"

These people said respectfully.

"This is the information of the Devouring Mountain, each of you go and find it at all costs, and whoever finds the Devouring Mountain will have a great reward. Yan Yan commanded.

"Yes, Mountain Lord!"

The people answered.

Immediately, these peak Legendary Realm Lords and half-step Eternal Masters went to investigate.

In the following days, Ye Tian wandered around the Seventh Realm River, learning about the Seventh Realm River while inquiring about the whereabouts of the Devouring Mountain.

Although he asked for the help of Yan Yan's controller, he couldn't rely on Yan Yan's master completely, and he had to find the Devouring Mountain himself.

In addition, he also discovered that the Seventh Boundary River also has the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce.

In the past, he thought that the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce was only in the thirteenth Boundary River, but now he naturally doesn't think so.

In fact, the headquarters of the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce is in the origin of the Jiehai, and there are also Jiehe Chamber of Commerce among the other Jiehe, all of which belong to the branch.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian spent a lot of Boundary River coins in the Seventh Boundary River to find the Devouring Mountain, as for whether anyone knows, it is not good to say.

In the following years, Ye Tian's body continued to cultivate, improving his control power.

He is now considered the top seven-domain level master, and he is only one step away from the eight-domain level master, so there is hope for breaking the shackles.

Moreover, his will has reached the middle of the ninth order, and there is almost no bottleneck until he reaches the late ninth order, and he can slowly improve.

If the will is improved, the strength is also improved.

Relying on time to slowly cultivate, his strength will eventually break the shackles and be promoted to the combat power of the Eight Domains-level Master.

Of course, what Ye Tian longed for most was to be able to create an Origin Control Technique.

If you can create an Origin Control Technique, your strength will really grow by leaps and bounds.

However, the Origin Mastery Technique was too difficult to create, and it took too long to create.

Ye Tiandu has controlled three thousand paths, and he doesn't know how much he has accumulated, and even with the assistance of a secret technique like the secret of enlightenment, he also feels that it is difficult, if he is an other eternal master, he will almost never be able to create an origin control technique.

At present, the most reliable means of improvement is to devour special life, if he devours the Devouring Mountain, his strength will definitely skyrocket, and maybe he will have the hope of stepping into the combat power of the Nine Domains level controller in a short time.

Unconsciously, thirty thousand world river years have passed.

And in these years, the Seventh Realm River was very lively, and many people were exploring the Devouring Mountain.

Originally, the later beings did not know about the existence of the Devouring Mountain, but now the news has spread all over the Seventh Realm River, which has also caused a trend to find the Devouring Mountain, and many people do not know the situation, and they still think that the Devouring Mountain has a great opportunity.

At this time, even if someone told him that the Devouring Mountain was not a chance, they would not believe it, but only believe in what they thought it was.

For Ye Tian, this is a good thing, because there are more cultivators looking for the Devouring Mountain, and the hope of finding it is greater.

this day.

Somewhere in the Seventh Realm River, a half-step Eternal Master came here and saw a very strange mountain.

The mountain is huge, and it feels like a special creature to him.

At this time, he thought of the boiling Devouring Mountain that had been rumored in the Seventh Realm River recently, and suddenly secretly guessed in his heart: "This can't be the Devouring Mountain, right?"

Thereupon.

He unleashed his attack and bombarded the strange mountain.

Rumble!!!

An energy attack hit the mountain, but it didn't cause any waves, but was swallowed up by the mountain.

"It's really a devouring mountain, devouring energy, everyone is looking for it, and it is willing to contain great opportunities!"

Immediately.

He flew up the Devouring Mountain, wanting to see if there was anything good on it.

However.

Airplanes!

The Devouring Mountain turned into a stone mouth and directly swallowed the half-step Eternal Master.

But fortunately, this half-step Eternal Master came here only as a clone, not as an entity.

Therefore, the doppelganger fell, and his body naturally knew it.

Immediately, this half-step Eternal Controller knew that the Devouring Mountain also had a strength comparable to that of the Eternal Master, so he naturally didn't dare to come here, and directly sold the news, thus making a lot of money.

And for the first time, Ye Tian also got the news from Yan Yan's controller, so he rushed over.
